label: Stat part (deathresting)
description: Applies a factor to the stat when the pawn is in a deathrest state.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factor.label: Factor
factor.description: Stat multiplier applied while the pawn is deathresting.
